problem id: 4bff6780
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) OR SHR(4)

examples:
  00001100 -> 00110000
  10011010 -> 01101011
  00100100 -> 10010010
  11001111 -> 00111111
  01001010 -> 00101101
  00111010 -> 11101011
  00110101 -> 11010111
  00110011 -> 11001111

query: 11110000
predicted answer: 11001111
